# pfsense_dhcpv4_server (Resource)

DHCPv4 [server configuration](https://docs.netgate.com/pfsense/en/latest/services/dhcp/ipv4.html) for a single network interface. This is a **singleton-per-interface** resource — only one instance can exist per pfSense interface. Removing the resource from Terraform will reset the DHCP server settings to defaults.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `interface` (String) Network interface. Each interface has its own separate DHCP server configuration.

### Optional

- `apply` (Boolean) Apply change, defaults to `true`.
- `default_lease_time` (String) Default lease time for clients that do not ask for a specific expiration time.
- `deny_unknown` (Boolean) Deny leases to unknown MAC addresses. Only known clients (those with static mappings) will receive leases.
- `dns_servers` (List of String) DNS servers provided to DHCP clients (up to 4).
- `domain_name` (String) Domain name provided to DHCP clients.
- `domain_search_list` (List of String) DNS search domains provided to DHCP clients.
- `enable` (Boolean) Enable DHCP server on this interface.
- `gateway` (String) Gateway IPv4 address provided to DHCP clients. Leave empty to use the interface IP address.
- `ignore_client_uids` (Boolean) Ignore client UIDs (option 61) in DHCP requests. Use only MAC addresses for identification.
- `ldap_server` (String) LDAP server URI provided to DHCP clients.
- `mac_allow` (String) Comma-separated list of partial MAC addresses to allow. Patterns matched from the beginning (e.g. '00:1A:2B').
- `mac_deny` (String) Comma-separated list of partial MAC addresses to deny. Patterns matched from the beginning (e.g. '00:1A:2B').
- `maximum_lease_time` (String) Maximum lease time for clients that ask for a specific expiration time.
- `ntp_servers` (List of String) NTP (Network Time Protocol) servers provided to DHCP clients (up to 4).
- `range_from` (String) Start of the DHCP address pool range.
- `range_to` (String) End of the DHCP address pool range.
- `static_arp` (Boolean) Enable Static ARP entries. **All** clients must have static mappings. Only the machines listed will be able to communicate with the firewall on this interface.
- `tftp_server` (String) TFTP server hostname or IP address provided to DHCP clients.
- `wins_servers` (List of String) WINS (Windows Internet Name Service) servers provided to DHCP clients (up to 2).
